subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast attained, both aforetime and since, unto the effusions of the Most Exalted Pen. Verily, both pen and tongue are powerless to make mention of this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از قبل و بعد باثار قلم اعلی فائز گشتی قلم و لسان از ذکر اینمقام عاجز
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
